_notes.goal: $30 -> $100 in 7 days (+233%). Aggressive Kelly, tight stops, fast scanning.
_notes.max_bet_rationale: 33% of starting budget per trade — allows big swings with limited capital
_notes.max_hours_rationale: 48h cap: near-term forecasts are more accurate, markets resolve faster
_notes.min_ev_rationale: 0.06 is lower than default 0.10 — catches more high-quality opportunities without going too low
_notes.kelly_rationale: 0.40 fractional Kelly — aggressive but bounded; tuner can push to 0.50
_notes.monitor_interval_rationale: 5 min vs 10 min default — faster stop/take-profit execution
_notes.stop_loss_pct_rationale: 78% of entry (was 80%) — cuts losses slightly faster on wrong bets
_notes.take_profit_rationale: 0.70 / 0.82 / 0.50 — locks in gains at all time horizons including final 24h
_notes.take_profit_roi_rationale: 0.40 = sell when price is 40% above entry — always active, locks in guaranteed profit
_notes.scan_regions_rationale: Enable US cities (NYC, Chicago etc) for more trade opportunities daily
